summary: List Project Action Plan Template Items
description: Gets the list of Project Action Plan Template Items

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[plan_template_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Template ID.

parameters.name: filters[plan_template_section_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Template Section ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Direction (asc/desc) can be controlled by the presence or absence of '-' before the sort parameter.

items.description: Project Action Plan Template Item Assignee (Compact)

created_at.description: Time the Project Action Plan Template Item was created

due_at.description: Time the Project Action Plan Template Item is due

description.description: Acceptance criteria of the Project Action Plan Template Item

holding_type.description: Project Action Plan Template Item holding type specifies whether the current item holds all the succeeding items in the section or the plan

plan_template_id.description: Plan Template ID the Project Action Plan Template Item belongs to

position.description: Postion of the Project Action Plan Template Item

plan_template_section_id.description: Plan Template Section ID the Project Action Plan Template Item belongs to

title.description: Title of the Project Action Plan Template Item

updated_at.description: Time the Project Action Plan Template Item was updated
